name: Imperialdramon: Fighter Mode (Black)

signature_move.name: Positron Laser
signature_move.description: Fires an energy blast from thePositron Laseron its left arm.

description: A form that controlled the berserk Imperialdramon: Dragon Mode (Black) with a heart of darkness, changing its form into a Virus Fighter Mode . It rejects Vaccine Digimon, and prefers targeting Digimon affiliated with the Virus Busters in particular to eliminate them. In addition to being fired for bombardments, the " Positron Laser " equipped to its left arm turns into the " Positron Laser Lance " by extending the heat sink , and delivers a powerful blow. Also, its " Giga Death ", in which it inserts the Positron Laser into the dragon-face on its chest, and then emits all of its body's energy as a destructive energy wave, now has unfathomable offensive ability with increased destructive power.
